title: ilauke 6 Pack Crochet Yarn for Knitting, Colorful Double Knitting Wool, Acrylic Yarn for Knitting Crafting and Crochet DIY Craft (50g, 4-Ply)
features: [Premium Quality]: These wool for crochet are made of 100% soft acrylic, 50g of per ball, 6 in total. Super soft and durable, great quality for crochet projects.
[Crochet Yarn Included] 6 balls of knitting yarn, made of 100% Acrylic, each ball weighs 50 g.
[Multi-Color Yarn]: Our rainbow wool for knitting is made of different colors, ordinary but advanced. Suitable for knitting yarns for various occasions,and they can meet your various knitting needs.
[Washing Method] Not fade or shrunk after washing. Hand wash or machine wash both available, machine wash should be done so with care, naturally dry, do not bleach, do not iron.

[Wide Applications] Perfect for knit kid and adults’ toys, scarf, hat, shawl and so on. If you have any problem with our wool yarn, just contact us freely and we will solve it for you at the first time.
description: Product Description Make your life more colorful and interesting! These weaving yarns are available in muti colors, allowing you to choose the most suitable knitting color for you. Various colors also provide you with unlimited imagination and creativity, allowing you to make different DIY crafts. These premium skeins of yarn are really easy to maintain and have great value. Whether you’re a beginner or not, we’re all about making yarn crafts fun for all. Making it easier to get started on your dream knitted, crocheted or weaved project than ever before! Material 100% Acrylic Length 100m per skein Weight 50g per skein, 300g total Package 6 colorful knitting wool balls + 1 storage bag Washing Machine washable - Dry clean Warnings Do not chlorine bleach, do not tumble dry ilauke 65Pcs Crochet Hooks ilauke 42Pcs Crochet Hooks ilauke Crochet Yarn 6x50g Blue&Red ilauke Crochet Yarn 6x50g Yellow&Red&Blue ilauke Crochet Yarn 6x50g Khaki ilauke Crochet Yarn 6x50g Purple&Blue&Yellow Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,722 4.6 out of 5 stars 279 4.2 out of 5 stars 970 4.2 out of 5 stars 970 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,327 4.2 out of 5 stars 970 Price £27.52 £ 27 . 52 — no data £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 Number of Piece 65 42 6 6 6 6 Weight no data no data 300g 300g 300g 300g
